hooks.command: output=$(cd /home/user/h2568 && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1); [ -n "$output" ] && echo "$output" | jq -Rs '{"decision":"block","reason":("TypeScript errors — fix before committing:\n" + .)}' || true
f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); echo "$f" | grep -q '\.ts$' && cd /home/user/h2568 && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -20 || true

printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostCompact","additionalContext":"You are working on claude-flow: a TypeScript CLI/SDK for AI agent orchestration. Source in src/, compiled to dist-cjs/. Build: npm run build. Type check: npx tsc --noEmit. CLI entry: src/cli/simple-cli.ts. SDK: src/sdk/claude-flow-mcp-integration.ts. Checkpoints stored in .claude-flow/checkpoints/. Available skills: /build /typecheck /test /checkpoint /reset /explain /audit /stats /docs"}}'
{ [ -d /home/user/h2568/node_modules ] || (cd /home/user/h2568 && npm install --silent 2>/dev/null); [ -d /home/user/h2568/dist-cjs ] || (cd /home/user/h2568 && npm run build 2>/dev/null); } || true
